selections.name: Musee Du Louvre
selections.reason: Led on debut and held on for 2nd. The inside draw is a massive advantage at Mackay and she should control the pace.

selections.name: Bonewood
selections.reason: Resuming after a solid trial. Showed some ability last preparation and draws reasonably well here.

selections.name: Aye Vee Aitch
selections.reason: Won a recent trial and resumes here. The wide draw is a slight concern but has the class to feature.

selections.name: Betty Boom
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 2. Has been racing fairly and can sneak into the exotics from the good gate.

danger_horse.name: Lilsisterdon'tcha
danger_horse.reason: Resuming trial winner but has to overcome a tricky wide draw. Definite threat if she can cross early.

selections.name: Agnar
selections.reason: Has placed in his last three starts and possesses good tactical speed. Should be prominent throughout.

selections.name: Doubtful Angel
selections.reason: Finished a close 2nd last start. Drawn well and maps to get a great run near the speed.

selections.name: Atomic Time (NZ)
selections.reason: Resuming with a solid trial under his belt. The wide draw is the main negative, but he has the class.

selections.name: Willow Capri
selections.reason: Drawn well in barrier 4. Has been racing fairly and can improve from the inside gate.

danger_horse.name: Atomic Time (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Class runner of the field but needs luck from the wide gate.

selections.name: Upstart Legend
selections.reason: Finished a strong 2nd last start and draws perfectly in barrier 2. Maps to get the run of the race.

selections.name: Zaya
selections.reason: Coming off a win last start. Has good tactical speed and should be right in the finish again.

selections.name: Lucky Lass
selections.reason: Also coming off a win. Racing in great form but draws a bit sticky in barrier 7.

selections.name: La Petite Maison
selections.reason: Consistent performer but has been handed a terrible draw. Will need luck but can figure on best form.

danger_horse.name: Melo Melo Kava
danger_horse.reason: Finished 2nd last start and is always competitive at this level.

selections.name: Four Leaf Wonder
selections.reason: Drawn the coveted inside rail. Placed 3rd last start and should get a dream run behind the speed.

selections.name: Sound The Bugle
selections.reason: Won nicely last start. Confidence is high, though barrier 8 will require a good ride.

selections.name: Five Star King
selections.reason: Finished 3rd last start and has early speed. Needs to cross from out wide but is a major player.

selections.name: Too Many Kisses
selections.reason: Drawn beautifully in barrier 2. Finished 4th last start and can improve with the soft run.

danger_horse.name: Five Star King
danger_horse.reason: Dangerous front-runner if he can cross the field without expending too much energy.

selections.name: Spirit Of Mac
selections.reason: Drawn the pole position which is gold here. Finished 3rd last start and maps to get every favor.

selections.name: Smashing Rosie
selections.reason: Coming off a strong win. Racing in peak form and should be highly competitive again.

selections.name: Determination
selections.reason: Finished 2nd last start. Consistent type but the wide draw makes things slightly trickier.

selections.name: Rashford
selections.reason: Another consistent performer who finished 2nd last start. Needs luck from the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Determination
danger_horse.reason: Always around the mark and can win if the breaks go his way.

selections.name: Mister Doobee
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 3. Finished a close 2nd last start and should get the run of the race.

selections.name: I'lltellyoutonight
selections.reason: Finished 2nd last start and is racing well. Needs to overcome a slightly tricky draw.

selections.name: Scialla
selections.reason: Won last start but has been handed the extreme outside draw. Will need a brilliant ride to feature.

selections.name: Betterlucknexttime
selections.reason: Finished 3rd last start and has early speed. Wide draw is a negative but has ability.

danger_horse.name: Scialla
danger_horse.reason: Last start winner who is dangerous if she can somehow find a position from the outside gate.

selections.name: Mayor Of Kingston
selections.reason: Drawn well in barrier 3. Finished 3rd last start and should appreciate the inside run.

selections.name: Citiroc
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 2. Finished 4th last start and maps to get a very economical run.

selections.name: Mordecai
selections.reason: Won last start but has to overcome a wide draw. In great form and cannot be dismissed.

selections.name: Shiny Love (NZ)
selections.reason: Another last start winner who has drawn poorly. Needs luck but has the winning form.

danger_horse.name: Mordecai
danger_horse.reason: In winning form and is a massive threat if he can slot in somewhere from the wide gate.

selections.name: Daimyo (JPN)
selections.reason: Resuming after a win last preparation. Drawn the pole position and maps to get the perfect run.

selections.name: Sunnycoast
selections.reason: Finished 2nd last start and has excellent early speed. Should be prominent from the jump.

selections.name: Red Hot Lizzie
selections.reason: Gains a start as an emergency. Won last start and draws well in barrier 4. Big chance.

selections.name: Han Dynasty
selections.reason: Finished 2nd last start and is racing consistently. Should be right in the mix again.

danger_horse.name: Sunnycoast
danger_horse.reason: Pace angle who can take catching if he gets his own way in front.
